task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from a full S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket-name/path/to/file.txt') and extract only the bucket name
solution_criteria: The regex should correctly extract bucket names from S3 URIs, handling various valid S3 bucket naming conventions (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens) and return only the bucket name without the 's3://' prefix or path

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that includes function name, runtime, role ARN, timeout, and memory allocation settings
solution_criteria: The JSON should be valid and contain all required Lambda function configuration fields with realistic AWS values, proper data types (string for ARN, integer for timeout and memory), and follow AWS naming conventions

task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS IAM role name according to AWS naming rules (alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and forward slashes allowed; 1-64 characters long) and returns True if valid, False otherwise
solution_criteria: The function should correctly validate IAM role names against AWS rules, handle edge cases (empty strings, names exceeding 64 characters), and return a boolean value
